queries.title: BackTag Carcass
queries.description: Looks up the BackTagCarcasses record for this carcass ID. Provides kill group ID, purchase group, CPS transfer status, and EID.

sql_blocks.label: BackTag Lookup
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
        KillDate,
        KillGroupId,
        PurchaseGroup,
        CpsTransferStatus,
        Eid
    FROM BackTagCarcasses WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE CarcassId = @carcass_id
    ORDER BY KillDate DESC

queries.title: Hot Carcass
queries.description: Looks up the HotCarcasses record for this carcass ID. Provides side, kill dates, and approval details.

sql_blocks.label: Hot Carcass Lookup
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
        Side,
        KillDate,
        BackTagKillDate,
        ApprovedBy,
        ApprovedDate
    FROM HotCarcasses WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE BackTagCarcassId = @carcass_id
    ORDER BY KillDate DESC

queries.title: EPV Carcass
queries.description: Looks up the EpVCarcasses record for this carcass ID. Provides grade, quality program, approval details, and CPS transfer status.

sql_blocks.label: EPV Lookup
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
        Grade,
        QualityProgram,
        ApprovedBy,
        ApprovedDate,
        CpsTransfer
    FROM EpVCarcasses WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE CarcassId = @carcass_id

queries.title: Raw Interface Data
queries.description: Searches RawInterfaceData for records whose data column contains the carcass ID. Returns MessageId, StatusId, and the raw data payload.

sql_blocks.label: Raw Interface Search
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT
        MessageId,
        StatusId,
        Data
    FROM RawInterfaceData WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE Data LIKE '%' + @carcass_id + '%'
    AND serviceid = 'EPVService'
    ORDER BY MessageId

queries.title: Kill Group
queries.description: Looks up the KillGroups record using the kill group ID from the BackTag. Provides schedule group, purchase group, and head count.

sql_blocks.label: Kill Group Lookup
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT
        ScheduleGroup,
        PurchaseGroup,
        HeadCount
    FROM KillGroups WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE KillGroupId = @killgroupid

queries.title: Lot Details
queries.description: Looks up the LotDetails record using the schedule group from the Kill Group. Provides scheduled and received head counts.

sql_blocks.label: Lot Details Lookup
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT
        ScheduledHeadCount,
        ReceivedHeadCount
    FROM LotDetails WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE ScheduleGroup = @schedulegroup
